rationale: Removed the deprecated executionStatusPillClasses compatibility alias and updated remaining call sites plus tests to use executionStatusPillProps directly.
Dropped the unused executionStatusPillClasses import from task-detail.tsx and kept only executionStatusPillProps.
Deleted the executionStatusPillClasses export and migrated all remaining frontend callers off the alias.
Removed executionStatusPillClasses from the test imports so the spec exercises the canonical helper only.
Updated the class-name expectations to assert executionStatusPillProps(...).className directly.
Top-level Gemini summary review duplicated the actionable inline width feedback that is addressed below.
Reduced desktop floating-bar grid minimums from 18/15/12rem to 12/10/8rem so the widened bar stays fluid on mid-width viewports.
Updated the Create page CSS expectation test to match the relaxed 12/10/8rem floating-bar grid minimums.
Restored shrinkable mid-width behavior by reducing the desktop column minimums rather than keeping overflow-prone fixed widths.
Top-level Codex review wrapper contained no additional actionable feedback beyond the inline comment already addressed.
